titlestmt.titleproper: Scott Chesneys Gay Games and Stonewall 25 March memorabilia7583
titlestmt.author: Compiled by

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-06 18:52:14 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Scott Chesneys Gay Games and Stonewall 25 March memorabilia
did.abstract: Programs, fliers, handouts, event-specific magazines, newspapers, broadsides, and other memorabilia from the Gay Games 94 in New York City, and the Stonewall 25 March.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Andrea HektorPeter Martinez, June 2003Ezra Corral, July 2008

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Gay Games participant, member of New York Ice, the hockey team.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Programs, fliers, handouts, event-specific magazines, newspapers, broasides, and other memorabilia from the Gay Games 94 in New York City, and the Stonewall 25 March.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Barbara Neal's Gay Games memorabilia, #7584. Arthur S. Leonard's Gay Games and Stonewall 25 celebration memorabilia, #7585

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Scott Chesney's Gay Games 94 and Stonewall 25 March memorabilia, #7583. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
